notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: José Fermín steals (1) 2nd base. José Fermín to 3rd. José Fermín advances to 3rd, on a throwing error by catcher Kyle Higashioka.

notableEvents.label: Ezequiel Duran reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Ezequiel Duran reaches on a fielding error by first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Alejandro Osuna GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Alejandro Osuna grounds into a double play, shortstop Masyn Winn to first baseman Alec Burleson. Ezequiel Duran out at 2nd. Alejandro Osuna out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue doubles (4) on a sharp ground ball to right fielder Jordan Walker.

notableEvents.label: Cody Freeman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Cody Freeman singles on a line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker, deflected by first baseman Alec Burleson.

notableEvents.label: Justin Foscue pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Justin Foscue grounds into a force out, shortstop Masyn Winn to second baseman Thomas Saggese. Cody Freeman out at 2nd.
